content.content:
1вҶ’# MMS 2вҶ’ 3вҶ’**Metro Fleet Mileage Management System** 4вҶ’ 5вҶ’Constraint-based fleet management platform for train deployments and preventive maintenance scheduling over a 12-year government contract period. 6вҶ’ 7вҶ’## Architecture 8вҶ’ 9вҶ’``` 10вҶ’в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ 11вҶ’в”Ӯ Frontend (Vite + React 18) в”Ӯ 12вҶ’в”Ӯ deck.gl Canvas в”Ӯ BlueprintJS Components в”Ӯ @belt/tools State Machines в”Ӯ 13вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ 14вҶ’ в”Ӯ /api/* 15вҶ’ в–ј 16вҶ’в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ 17вҶ’в”Ӯ API Server (Bun + Hono) в”Ӯ 18вҶ’в”Ӯ REST Endpoints в”Ӯ OpenAPI Spec в”Ӯ OpenTelemetry Traces в”Ӯ 19вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ 20вҶ’ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 21вҶ’ в–ј в–ј в–ј 22вҶ’в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ 23вҶ’в”Ӯ PostgreSQL в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Redis в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Workers в”Ӯ 24вҶ’в”Ӯ + TimescaleDBв”Ӯ в”Ӯ Queues + Cache в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (BullMQ) в”Ӯ 25вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ 26вҶ’ в”Ӯ 27вҶ’ в–ј 28вҶ’ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ 29вҶ’ в”Ӯ C++ Optimizer в”Ӯ 30вҶ’ в”Ӯ (OR-Tools) в”Ӯ 31вҶ’ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ 32вҶ’``` 33вҶ’ 34вҶ’**Stack:** 35вҶ’- **Runtime**: Bun 1.x 36вҶ’- **Database**: PostgreSQL 17 + TimescaleDB (time-series) 37вҶ’- **Queue**: BullMQ (Redis-backed job processing) 38вҶ’- **API**: Hono framework with OpenAPI/Zod validation 39вҶ’- **Frontend**: React 18 + deck.gl (WebGL) + BlueprintJS v6 40вҶ’- **State**: @belt/tools machines (NOT React hooks/zustand) 41вҶ’- **Optimizer**: C++ with OR-Tools CP-SAT solver 42вҶ’ 43вҶ’## Quick Start 44вҶ’ 45вҶ’### Prerequisites 46вҶ’ 47вҶ’- [Bun](https://bun.sh) (latest) 48вҶ’- PostgreSQL 17 + TimescaleDB (see [SETUP.md](SETUP.md) for installation) 49вҶ’- Redis 50вҶ’ 51вҶ’### Development Setup 52вҶ’ 53вҶ’For detailed setup instructions, see [SETUP.md](SETUP.md). 54вҶ’ 55вҶ’```bash 56вҶ’# 1. Clone and install dependencies 57вҶ’git clone 58вҶ’cd mms/system 59вҶ’bun install 60вҶ’ 61вҶ’# 2. Setup environment 62вҶ’cp .env.example .env 63вҶ’ 64вҶ’# 3. Start services (if not already running) 65вҶ’brew services start postgresql@17 66вҶ’brew services start redis 67вҶ’ 68вҶ’# 4. Create database and user 69вҶ’createdb mms 70вҶ’psql -d postgres -c "CREATE USER mms WITH PASSWORD 'mms_dev_password';" 71вҶ’psql -d postgres -c "ALTER DATABASE mms OWNER TO mms;" 72вҶ’ 73вҶ’# 5. Run schema and migrations 74вҶ’bunx drizzle-kit push --force 75вҶ’psql -U mms -d mms -f drizzle/manual/0001_extensions.sql 76вҶ’psql -U mms -d mms -f drizzle/manual/0002_timescaledb.sql 77вҶ’psql -U mms -d mms -f drizzle/manual/0003_functions.sql 78вҶ’psql -U mms -d mms -f drizzle/manual/0004_materialized_views.sql 79вҶ’ 80вҶ’# 6. Seed demo data 81вҶ’psql -U mms -d mms -f drizzle/manual/seed_demo.sql 82вҶ’ 83вҶ’# 7. Start development server (API + Frontend) 84вҶ’bun run dev 85вҶ’``` 86вҶ’ 87вҶ’This starts: 88вҶ’- **API Server** - port shown in console (`API_SERVER_PORT=XXXX`) 89вҶ’- **Frontend** - port shown in console (`Local: http://localhost:XXXX`) 90вҶ’ 91вҶ’### Development Commands 92вҶ’ 93вҶ’| Command | Description | 94вҶ’|---------|-------------| 95вҶ’| `bun run dev` | Start API + Frontend (recommended) | 96вҶ’| `bun run dev:api` | Start API server only | 97вҶ’| `bun run dev:frontend` | Start Vite frontend only | 98вҶ’| `bun run dev:workers` | Start background workers only | 99вҶ’| `WORKERS=all bun run dev` | Start everything including workers | 100вҶ’ 101вҶ’### Validation Commands 102вҶ’ 103вҶ’Run in order before committing: 104вҶ’ 105вҶ’```bash 106вҶ’bun test # Unit tests for changed files 107вҶ’bun run typecheck # TypeScript strict mode 108вҶ’bun run lint # ESLint 109вҶ’bun run build # Full build 110вҶ’``` 111вҶ’ 112вҶ’### Testing 113вҶ’ 114вҶ’```bash 115вҶ’bun run test # All unit tests 116вҶ’bun run test:unit # Unit tests only 117вҶ’bun run test:integration # Integration tests (needs DB/Redis) 118вҶ’bun run test:e2e # End-to-end tests (Playwright) 119вҶ’``` 120вҶ’ 121вҶ’For integration tests, use random ports to avoid conflicts: 122вҶ’```bash 123вҶ’PORT=0 bun run test:integration 124вҶ’``` 125вҶ’ 126вҶ’## Project Structure 127вҶ’ 128вҶ’``` 129вҶ’src/ 130вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ api/ # Hono REST endpoints 131вҶ’в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ server.ts # API entry point 132вҶ’в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ routes/ # Route definitions 133вҶ’в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ middleware/ # Auth, validation, logging 134вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ services/ # Domain business logic 135вҶ’в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ fleet/ # Fleet management 136вҶ’в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ scheduling/ # PM scheduling 137вҶ’в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ optimizer/ # Constraint solver interface 138вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ workers/ # BullMQ background jobs 139вҶ’в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ runner.ts # Worker entry point 140вҶ’в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ handlers/ # Job processors 141вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ lib/ # Shared utilities 142вҶ’в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ db/ # Drizzle ORM connection 143вҶ’в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ redis/ # Redis client 144вҶ’в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ logging/ # Pino + OpenTelemetry 145вҶ’в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ schemas/ # Shared Zod schemas 146вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ engine/ # PM projection algorithm 147вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ canvas/ # deck.gl infinite canvas 148вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ components/ # React UI components 149вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җ store/ # @belt/tools state machines 150вҶ’ 151вҶ’specs/ # Source of truth (9 spec documents) 152вҶ’ralph/ # Ralph Wiggum task orchestration 153вҶ’scripts/ # Development utilities 154вҶ’mms-optimizer/ # C++ OR-Tools binary 155вҶ’``` 156вҶ’ 157вҶ’## Environment Variables 158вҶ’ 159вҶ’Key variables (see `.env.example` for full list): 160вҶ’ 161вҶ’| Variable | Default | Description | 162вҶ’|----------|---------|-------------| 163вҶ’| `PORT` | `0` (random) | API server port (0 = auto-assign) | 164вҶ’| `VITE_PORT` | `0` (random) | Frontend dev server port (0 = auto-assign) | 165вҶ’| `DATABASE_URL` | `postgresql://mms:mms_dev_password@localhost:5432/mms` | PostgreSQL connection | 166вҶ’| `REDIS_HOST` | `localhost` | Redis hostname | 167вҶ’| `REDIS_PORT` | `6379` | Redis port | 168вҶ’| `JWT_SECRET` | (dev default) | Auth token signing | 169вҶ’| `WORKERS` | (all) | Comma-separated worker list | 170вҶ’| `LOG_LEVEL` | `debug` | Logging verbosity | 171вҶ’ 172вҶ’## API Endpoints 173вҶ’ 174вҶ’| Endpoint | Description | 175вҶ’|----------|-------------| 176вҶ’| `GET /health` | Liveness probe | 177вҶ’| `GET /ready` | Readiness probe (checks DB + Redis) | 178вҶ’| `GET /metrics` | Prometheus metrics | 179вҶ’| `GET /api/fleet` | List fleet trains | 180вҶ’| `GET /api/schedule` | Get schedule data | 181вҶ’| `POST /api/schedule/optimize` | Trigger optimization | 182вҶ’ 183вҶ’## Domain Concepts 184вҶ’ 185вҶ’- **PM (Preventive Maintenance)**: C1, C2, C3, C4, Overhaul cycles 186вҶ’- **Run Assignment**: Daily train-to-route allocation 187вҶ’- **Compliance Window**: Valid date range for PM scheduling 188вҶ’- **Bow Wave**: Accumulation of deferred maintenance (risk indicator) 189вҶ’- **TCO**: Total Cost of Ownership (12-year projection) 190вҶ’ 191вҶ’**Constraint Hierarchy:** 192вҶ’1. **Hard constraints**: Safety, physical limits - NEVER violate 193вҶ’2. **Soft constraints**: Compliance windows, preferences - violate with penalty 194вҶ’3. **Material constraints**: Check inventory before scheduling PM 195вҶ’4. **Track constraints**: Validate track capability for PM type 196вҶ’ 197вҶ’--- 198вҶ’ 199вҶ’## @belt/tools Utilities Reference 200вҶ’ 201вҶ’The `@belt/tools` package provides comprehensive utilities for state management, runtime validation, and common operations. All utilities are already available in this project. 202вҶ’ 203вҶ’### State Machine 204вҶ’ 205вҶ’Immer-based reactive state management with React hooks and automatic cache management. 206вҶ’ 207вҶ’#### Creating Slices 208вҶ’ 209вҶ’```typescript 210вҶ’import { createSlice, createAsyncSlice, createMachine } from '@belt/tools'; 211вҶ’ 212вҶ’// Synchronous slice for local state 213вҶ’const fleetSlice = createSlice({ 214вҶ’ id: 'fleet', 215вҶ’ initial: { 216вҶ’ trains: [], 217вҶ’ pmHistory: [], 218вҶ’ selectedTrain: null as string | null, 219вҶ’ }, 220вҶ’ cache: { policy: 'session' }, // or 'public', 'private' 221вҶ’ reducers: { 222вҶ’ importFleet: (state, payload: Train[]) => { 223вҶ’ state.trains = payload; // Immer allows direct mutations 224вҶ’ }, 225вҶ’ selectTrain: (state, trainId: string) => { 226вҶ’ state.selectedTrain = trainId; 227вҶ’ }, 228вҶ’ clearSelection: (state) => { 229вҶ’ state.selectedTrain = null; 230вҶ’ }, 231вҶ’ }, 232вҶ’}); 233вҶ’ 234вҶ’// Async slice for data fetching 235вҶ’const analyticsSlice = createAsyncSlice({ 236вҶ’ id: 'analytics', 237вҶ’ cache: { 238вҶ’ policy: 'public', 239вҶ’ ttl: '5m', // Time-to-live using ms() format 240вҶ’ swr: true, // Stale-while-revalidate 241вҶ’ }, 242вҶ’ context: {}, 243вҶ’ load: async () => { 244вҶ’ const response = await fetch('/api/analytics'); 245вҶ’ return response.json(); 246вҶ’ }, 247вҶ’}); 248вҶ’``` 249вҶ’ 250вҶ’#### Creating Machines 251вҶ’ 252вҶ’```tsx 253вҶ’import { createMachine } from '@belt/tools'; 254вҶ’ 255вҶ’const appMachine = createMachine({ 256вҶ’ id: 'mms', 257вҶ’ slices: { 258вҶ’ fleet: fleetSlice, 259вҶ’ analytics: analyticsSlice, 260вҶ’ }, 261вҶ’ context: { userId: null }, // Global context 262вҶ’}); 263вҶ’ 264вҶ’// Use in React components 265вҶ’function FleetView() { 266вҶ’ const { state, actions } = appMachine.useMachine('fleet'); 267вҶ’ 268вҶ’ return ( 269вҶ’
270вҶ’ 273вҶ’
{state.trains.length} trains loaded
274вҶ’
275вҶ’ ); 276вҶ’} 277вҶ’``` 278вҶ’ 279вҶ’**Cache Policies:** 280вҶ’- `public` - Shared cache, TTL-based invalidation 281вҶ’- `private` - User-specific cache, invalidated on user change 282вҶ’- `session` - Session-specific cache, invalidated on app restart 283вҶ’ 284вҶ’--- 285вҶ’ 286вҶ’### Runtime Schema Validation 287вҶ’ 288вҶ’Type-safe runtime validation using TypeBox with concise syntax. 289вҶ’ 290вҶ’#### Basic Types 291вҶ’ 292вҶ’```typescript 293вҶ’import { createType, createSchema, isType, invariantType, InferType } from '@belt/tools'; 294вҶ’ 295вҶ’// Primitive types 296вҶ’const StringType = createType('string'); 297вҶ’const NumberType = createType('number'); 298вҶ’const BooleanType = createType('boolean'); 299вҶ’const DateType = createType('date'); 300вҶ’ 301вҶ’// Optional types (append ?) 302вҶ’const OptionalString = createType('string?'); 303вҶ’const OptionalNumber = createType('number?'); 304вҶ’ 305вҶ’// Array types (append []) 306вҶ’const StringArray = createType('string[]'); 307вҶ’const NumberArray = createType('number[]'); 308вҶ’ 309вҶ’// Type guards 310вҶ’if (isType(value, 'string')) { 311вҶ’ console.log(value.toUpperCase()); // TypeScript knows it's string 312вҶ’} 313вҶ’ 314вҶ’if (isType(value, 'date')) { 315вҶ’ console.log(value.toISOString()); // TypeScript knows it's Date 316вҶ’} 317вҶ’``` 318вҶ’ 319вҶ’#### Object Schemas 320вҶ’ 321вҶ’```typescript 322вҶ’import { createSchema, InferType } from '@belt/tools'; 323вҶ’ 324вҶ’// Define schema 325вҶ’const TrainModel = createSchema({ 326вҶ’ id: 'string', 327вҶ’ name: 'string', 328вҶ’ mileage: 'number', 329вҶ’ lastPM: 'date', 330вҶ’ tags: 'string[]', 331вҶ’ metadata: 'object?', // Optional generic object 332вҶ’}); 333вҶ’ 334вҶ’// Infer TypeScript type 335вҶ’type Train = InferType; 336вҶ’ 337вҶ’// Parse and validate 338вҶ’const train = TrainModel.parse({ 339вҶ’ id: 'T001', 340вҶ’ name: 'Red Line', 341вҶ’ mileage: 50000, 342вҶ’ lastPM: new Date('2025-01-01'), 343вҶ’ tags: ['metro', 'active'], 344вҶ’}); 345вҶ’ 346вҶ’// Validate without parsing 347вҶ’if (TrainModel.isValid(data)) { 348вҶ’ // TypeScript knows data is Train 349вҶ’} 350вҶ’ 351вҶ’// Assert type (throws if invalid) 352вҶ’invariantType(TrainModel, data); 353вҶ’``` 354вҶ’ 355вҶ’#### Complex Types 356вҶ’ 357вҶ’```typescript 358вҶ’import { createType } from '@belt/tools'; 359вҶ’ 360вҶ’// Nested objects 361вҶ’const PMEventType = createType({ 362вҶ’ properties: { 363вҶ’ trainId: 'string', 364вҶ’ scheduledDate: 'date', 365вҶ’ location: { 366вҶ’ properties: { 367вҶ’ facility: 'string', 368вҶ’ bay: 'number', 369вҶ’ }, 370вҶ’ }, 371вҶ’ tasks: { 372вҶ’ items: { // Array of objects 373вҶ’ properties: { 374вҶ’ code: 'string', 375вҶ’ duration: 'number', 376вҶ’ completed: 'boolean?', 377вҶ’ }, 378вҶ’ }, 379вҶ’ }, 380вҶ’ }, 381вҶ’}); 382вҶ’ 383вҶ’// Enums 384вҶ’const StatusEnum = createType({ 385вҶ’ enum: ['pending', 'in-progress', 'completed', 'cancelled'], 386вҶ’}); 387вҶ’ 388вҶ’// Unions 389вҶ’const IDType = createType({ 390вҶ’ union: ['string', 'number'], 391вҶ’}); 392вҶ’ 393вҶ’// Records (key-value maps) 394вҶ’const ConfigType = createType({ 395вҶ’ record: 'string', // Record 396вҶ’}); 397вҶ’``` 398вҶ’ 399вҶ’#### List Parsing 400вҶ’ 401вҶ’```typescript 402вҶ’// Parse array of items 403вҶ’const trainList = TrainModel.list().parse([ 404вҶ’ { id: 'T001', name: 'Red Line', mileage: 50000, lastPM: new Date(), tags: [] }, 405вҶ’ { id: 'T002', name: 'Blue Line', mileage: 30000, lastPM: new Date(), tags: [] }, 406вҶ’]); 407вҶ’ 408вҶ’// Parse array from nested path 409вҶ’const events = PMEventType.parseList(response, 'data.events'); 410вҶ’``` 411вҶ’ 412вҶ’--- 413вҶ’ 414вҶ’### Date Utilities 415вҶ’ 416вҶ’Date manipulation and formatting using date-fns. 417вҶ’ 418вҶ’```typescript 419вҶ’import { formatDate, setDefaultDateLocale, ms } from '@belt/tools'; 420вҶ’import { ptBR } from 'date-fns/locale'; 421вҶ’ 422вҶ’// Format dates 423вҶ’formatDate(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'); // '2026-01-14' 424вҶ’formatDate(new Date(), 'MMM dd, yyyy'); // 'Jan 14, 2026' 425вҶ’formatDate('2026-01-14', 'dd/MM/yyyy'); // '14/01/2026' 426вҶ’ 427вҶ’// Set global locale 428вҶ’setDefaultDateLocale(ptBR); 429вҶ’formatDate(new Date(), 'MMMM'); // 'janeiro' 430вҶ’ 431вҶ’// Override locale for single call 432вҶ’import { enUS } from 'date-fns/locale'; 433вҶ’formatDate(new Date(), 'MMMM', { locale: enUS }); // 'January' 434вҶ’ 435вҶ’// Time string conversion 436вҶ’ms('1s'); // 1000 437вҶ’ms('5m'); // 300000 438вҶ’ms('1h'); // 3600000 439вҶ’ms('2d'); // 172800000 440вҶ’ms('1w'); // 604800000 441вҶ’ms('1mo'); // ~2629800000 442вҶ’ms('1y'); // ~31557600000 443вҶ’ms('500ms'); // 500 444вҶ’ 445вҶ’// Use in configs 446вҶ’const CACHE_TTL = ms('5m'); 447вҶ’const DEBOUNCE = ms('300ms'); 448вҶ’const POLL_INTERVAL = ms('30s'); 449вҶ’``` 450вҶ’ 451вҶ’**Supported time units:** `ms`, `s`, `m`/`min`, `h`, `d`, `w`, `mo`/`mon`/`months`, `y` 452вҶ’ 453вҶ’--- 454вҶ’ 455вҶ’### Object Utilities 456вҶ’ 457вҶ’Type-safe object manipulation with deep path access. 458вҶ’ 459вҶ’```typescript 460вҶ’import { 461вҶ’ getProperty, 462вҶ’ setProperty, 463вҶ’ objectKeys, 464вҶ’ objectEntries, 465вҶ’ objectValues, 466вҶ’ keyBy, 467вҶ’ isObject, 468вҶ’ assertObject, 469вҶ’ requireAll, 470вҶ’ deepFreeze, 471вҶ’} from '@belt/tools'; 472вҶ’ 473вҶ’// Deep property access (type-safe) 474вҶ’const street = getProperty(user, 'address.street'); 475вҶ’const city = getProperty(user, 'address.city', true); // Allow falsy values 476вҶ’ 477вҶ’// Set nested properties 478вҶ’setProperty(train, 'metadata.lastInspection', new Date()); 479вҶ’ 480вҶ’// Object manipulation 481вҶ’const keys = objectKeys(train); // Type-safe keys 482вҶ’const entries = objectEntries(train); // Typed entries 483вҶ’const values = objectValues(train); // Typed values 484вҶ’ 485вҶ’// Array to object by key 486вҶ’const trainsById = keyBy(trains, 'id'); 487вҶ’// Or with function 488вҶ’const trainsByName = keyBy(trains, (t) => t.name); 489вҶ’ 490вҶ’// Type guards 491вҶ’if (isObject(value)) { 492вҶ’ // value is UnknownRecord 493вҶ’} 494вҶ’ 495вҶ’// Assert object with no falsy values 496вҶ’const validated = requireAll({ 497вҶ’ id: train.id, 498вҶ’ name: train.name, 499вҶ’ mileage: train.mileage, 500вҶ’}); 501вҶ’ 502вҶ’// Deep freeze (immutability) 503вҶ’const frozen = deepFreeze(config); 504вҶ’``` 505вҶ’ 506вҶ’**Path Examples:** 507вҶ’```typescript 508вҶ’type User = { 509вҶ’ id: string; 510вҶ’ profile: { 511вҶ’ address: { 512вҶ’ street: string; 513вҶ’ city: string; 514вҶ’ }; 515вҶ’ }; 516вҶ’}; 517вҶ’ 518вҶ’// All paths are type-checked 519вҶ’getProperty(user, 'id'); // вң“ string 520вҶ’getProperty(user, 'profile.address.city'); // вң“ string 521вҶ’getProperty(user, 'profile.invalid'); // вң— Type error 522вҶ’``` 523вҶ’ 524вҶ’--- 525вҶ’ 526вҶ’### String Utilities 527вҶ’ 528вҶ’String manipulation with type inference. 529вҶ’ 530вҶ’```typescript 531вҶ’import { capitalize, isString, assertString } from '@belt/tools'; 532вҶ’ 533вҶ’// Capitalize 534вҶ’capitalize('hello'); // 'Hello' (type: 'Hello') 535вҶ’ 536вҶ’// Type guards 537вҶ’if (isString(value)) { 538вҶ’ console.log(value.toUpperCase()); 539вҶ’} 540вҶ’ 541вҶ’// Assertions 542вҶ’assertString(value); 543вҶ’assertString(value, { notEmpty: true }); 544вҶ’assertString(value, { message: 'Name is required', notEmpty: true }); 545вҶ’``` 546вҶ’ 547вҶ’--- 548вҶ’ 549вҶ’### Error Handling 550вҶ’ 551вҶ’Comprehensive error utilities with stack trace management. 552вҶ’ 553вҶ’```typescript 554вҶ’import { 555вҶ’ invariant, 556вҶ’ tryCatch, 557вҶ’ InvariantError, 558вҶ’ createErrorList, 559вҶ’} from '@belt/tools'; 560вҶ’ 561вҶ’// Assertions 562вҶ’invariant(user.id, 'User ID is required'); 563вҶ’invariant(trains.length > 0, 'No trains found'); 564вҶ’ 565вҶ’// Safe error handling 566вҶ’const [error, result] = tryCatch(() => JSON.parse(data)); 567вҶ’if (error) { 568вҶ’ console.error('Parse failed:', error.message); 569вҶ’} else { 570вҶ’ console.log('Success:', result); 571вҶ’} 572вҶ’ 573вҶ’// Collect multiple errors 574вҶ’const errors = createErrorList('Validation failed: '); 575вҶ’if (!train.id) errors.add('Missing ID'); 576вҶ’if (!train.name) errors.add('Missing name'); 577вҶ’if (train.mileage < 0) errors.add('Invalid mileage'); 578вҶ’errors.check(); // Throws if any errors 579вҶ’``` 580вҶ’ 581вҶ’--- 582вҶ’ 583вҶ’### Type Utilities 584вҶ’ 585вҶ’Advanced TypeScript type helpers. 586вҶ’ 587вҶ’```typescript 588вҶ’import type { 589вҶ’ Paths, // All dot-notation paths of object 590вҶ’ PathType, // Type at specific path 591вҶ’ Compute, // Flatten intersection types 592вҶ’ Writable, // Remove readonly modifiers 593вҶ’ Falsy, // Union of falsy values 594вҶ’ InferType, // Infer type from schema 595вҶ’ UnknownRecord, // { [key: string]: unknown } 596вҶ’ AnyRecord, // { [key: string]: any } 597вҶ’ MaybePromise, // T | Promise 598вҶ’ MaybeArray, // T | T[] 599вҶ’ PromiseValue, // Extract Promise вҶ’ T 600вҶ’ Simplify, // Flatten complex types 601вҶ’ Merge, // Deep merge two types 602вҶ’ PartialFields, // Make specific fields optional 603вҶ’ NullableToPartial, // Convert nullable to optional 604вҶ’ UnionToIntersection, // Union вҶ’ Intersection 605вҶ’ CastUnknown, // Cast if unknown 606вҶ’ SerializableOnly, // Only serializable fields 607вҶ’} from '@belt/tools'; 608вҶ’ 609вҶ’// Example: Paths 610вҶ’type User = { 611вҶ’ id: string; 612вҶ’ profile: { 613вҶ’ address: { 614вҶ’ street: string; 615вҶ’ }; 616вҶ’ }; 617вҶ’}; 618вҶ’ 619вҶ’type UserPaths = Paths; 620вҶ’// 'id' | 'profile' | 'profile.address' | 'profile.address.street' 621вҶ’ 622вҶ’type StreetType = PathType; 623вҶ’// string 624вҶ’ 625вҶ’// Example: Compute (flatten intersections) 626вҶ’type A = { a: number }; 627вҶ’type B = { b: string }; 628вҶ’type Flat = Compute; // { a: number; b: string } 629вҶ’ 630вҶ’// Example: Writable 631вҶ’type ReadOnly = { readonly id: string; readonly name: string }; 632вҶ’type Mutable = Writable; // { id: string; name: string } 633вҶ’ 634вҶ’// Example: PartialFields 635вҶ’type Train = { id: string; name: string; metadata: object }; 636вҶ’type Optional = PartialFields; 637вҶ’// { id: string; name: string; metadata?: object } 638вҶ’``` 639вҶ’ 640вҶ’**Type Guards:** 641вҶ’```typescript 642вҶ’import { isFalsy } from '@belt/tools'; 643вҶ’import type { Falsy } from '@belt/tools'; 644вҶ’ 645вҶ’// All falsy values 646вҶ’const falsyValues: Falsy = false | '' | null | undefined | 0 | 0n | NaN; 647вҶ’ 648вҶ’if (isFalsy(value)) { 649вҶ’ // value is one of the falsy values 650вҶ’} 651вҶ’``` 652вҶ’ 653вҶ’--- 654вҶ’ 655вҶ’### Other Utilities 656вҶ’ 657вҶ’```typescript 658вҶ’import { delay, maskData, getTypeOf, createProxy } from '@belt/tools'; 659вҶ’ 660вҶ’// Async delay 661вҶ’await delay(500); // Wait 500ms 662вҶ’await delay(); // Default 500ms 663вҶ’ 664вҶ’// Mask sensitive data for logging 665вҶ’const masked = maskData({ 666вҶ’ password: 'secret123', 667вҶ’ email: 'user@example.com', 668вҶ’ nested: { token: 'abc123' }, 669вҶ’}); 670вҶ’// { password: 'String', email: 'String', nested: { token: 'String' } } 671вҶ’ 672вҶ’// Get type name 673вҶ’getTypeOf(null); // 'Null' 674вҶ’getTypeOf(undefined); // 'Undefined' 675вҶ’getTypeOf(new Date()); // 'Date' 676вҶ’getTypeOf({}); // 'Object' 677вҶ’getTypeOf([]); // 'Array' 678вҶ’getTypeOf(NaN); // 'NaN' 679вҶ’ 680вҶ’// Lazy initialization 681вҶ’const lazyConfig = createProxy(() => loadConfig()); 682вҶ’// Config is only loaded on first access 683вҶ’``` 684вҶ’ Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

content.text:
## Summary

**What exists:**

The MMS codebase is substantially developed with production-grade architecture:

**Source Code** (extensive):
- **API layer**: 30+ route files (fleet, scheduling, optimization, integration, baseline, drift, costing, etc.) with Hono + OpenAPI
- **Services**: 40+ domain services across fleet management, scheduling, optimization, PM calculations
- **Database**: Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL 17 + TimescaleDB, covering fleet, PM scheduling, compliance, component tracking, material management, costing, integration layers
- **Workers**: BullMQ background job handlers
- **UI**: React 18 with deck.gl (WebGL canvas), BlueprintJS v6 components, @belt/tools state machines
- **Optimizer**: C++ OR-Tools integration for constraint solving

**Specs** (comprehensive):
- 001: Executive Summary
- 002: Architecture
- 003: Database Schema (57KB)
- 004: Domain Services (136KB)
- 005: API (31KB)
- 006: User Interface (74KB)
- 007: Integration
- 008: Operations
- Plus RACE Design System

**Development State:**
Production-ready architecture with TypeScript strict mode, comprehensive testing (unit/integration/e2e), OpenTelemetry instrumentation, git version control. Recent commits indicate active development (project reorganization as of Feb 2).
